channel.title: SPL - Northgate Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Northgate Branch

item.title: Understanding AI
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a presentation and discussion on understanding AI.

Event details

item.title: 普通话故事会 / 國語故事會
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room / 会议室 / 會議室

在故事会，各年龄层的孩子（从0岁到小学生）和他们的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的学习活动。 活动使用普通话进行。------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------在故事會，各年齡層的孩子（從0歲到小學生）和他們的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的學習活動。 活動使用國語進行。

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Kids Make & Build
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to build, craft and create!

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

At baby story time, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: Reading with Rover
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Build reading skills and confidence by reading aloud to a certified therapy dog. 

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Reduced and Free Transit Fare Enrollment
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Northgate Branch

Low-income individuals and individuals with disabilities can receive a reduced-fare ORCA LIFT transit pass.Individuals receiving TANF, RCA, PWA, SSI, HEN, or ABD can receive a subsidized year-long pass.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Northgate Branch, Meeting Room

At baby story time, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details
